description: Style Note Crafted from the finest leather, this shoe from windsor is designed to offer comfort at its best, without compromising on style. Packed with features that offer luxurious comfort, this pair makes you look your executive best when paired with formals and classy accessories. Product Details Brown shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailing A padded tongue and inner Foamy rubber outsole Thick TPU outsole with an upraised heel and multi-directional lugs Material and Care Leather Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with damp clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
